name: fable-mcp
description: MCP server that lets any MCP client (OpenAI Codex, etc.) consult Claude Fable 5 as a deep-reasoning architect, via Claude Code headless mode

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check hooks/fable-loop-stop.mjs && node --check hooks/inject-fable-instructions.mjs && node --check scripts/sync-plugin.mjs && node --check dist/server.bundled.mjs && node --check plugins/fable-mcp/dist/server.bundled.mjs
